endpoints.name: GET /v1/MediaProcessors
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/MediaProcessors
endpoints.description: A MediaProcessor resource provides the ability to capture content from a web application with a Twilio Media Extension to create a livestream.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/MediaProcessors/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Returns a single MediaProcessor resource identified by a SID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/MediaProcessors/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Updates a MediaProcessor resource identified by a SID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/MediaRecordings
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/MediaRecordings/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Returns a single MediaRecording resource identified by a SID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/MediaRecordings/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Deletes a MediaRecording resource identified by a SID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/PlayerStreamers
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/PlayerStreamers
endpoints.description: A PlayerStreamer resource provides the ability to send a livestream to a JavaScript, iOS, or Android Player SDK.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/PlayerStreamers/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Returns a single PlayerStreamer resource identified by a SID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/PlayerStreamers/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Updates a PlayerStreamer resource identified by a SID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/PlayerStreamers/{Sid}/PlaybackGrant
endpoints.description: **This method is not enabled.** Returns a single PlaybackGrant resource identified by a SID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/PlayerStreamers/{Sid}/PlaybackGrant
endpoints.description: A PlaybackGrant resource allows developers to generate a grant to initialize the Twilio Live Player SDK and connect to a livestream.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.
